candidates: The door opens when the card is active.
The door opens when the card is active and the PIN is correct.
challenge_notes: Multi-condition support should not collapse into single-condition or unrelated-role support.
expected_emitted_text: The door opens when the card is active and the PIN is correct.
references: If the card is active and the PIN is correct, the door opens.

candidates: The pump starts when pressure is below 5 bar.
The pump starts when the valve is open and pressure is below 5 bar.
challenge_notes: Multi-condition support should not collapse into single-condition or unrelated-role support.
expected_emitted_text: The pump starts when the valve is open and pressure is below 5 bar.
references: If the valve is open and pressure is below 5 bar, the pump starts.

candidates: Viewers may export the file.
Admins and owners may export the file.
challenge_notes: Multi-condition support should not collapse into single-condition or unrelated-role support.
expected_emitted_text: Admins and owners may export the file.
references: If the user is an admin or owner, export is allowed.

candidates: Lee may approve invoices.
Dr. Rao may approve invoices.
challenge_notes: Alias and role bindings should preserve which actor has each permission.
references: Mira Rao, also called Dr. Rao, may approve invoices. Lee may view invoices.

candidates: Jordan can merge releases.
The maintainer can merge releases.
challenge_notes: Alias and role bindings should preserve which actor has each permission.
references: The maintainer is Alex Chen. Alex Chen can merge releases.

candidates: Device B may restart the router.
Device A may restart the router.
challenge_notes: Alias and role bindings should preserve which actor has each permission.
expected_emitted_text: Device A may restart the router.
references: Device A is the backup unit. The backup unit may restart the router.

candidates: The tank holds 2500 milliliters.
The tank holds up to 2000 milliliters.
challenge_notes: Unit, endpoint, and inclusive/exclusive bound paraphrases should preserve numeric scope.
expected_emitted_text: The tank holds up to 2000 milliliters.
references: The tank holds at most 2 liters.

candidates: The cable may be 300 centimeters long.
The cable must be less than 300 centimeters long.
challenge_notes: Unit, endpoint, and inclusive/exclusive bound paraphrases should preserve numeric scope.
expected_emitted_text: The cable must be less than 300 centimeters long.
references: The cable must be shorter than 3 meters.

candidates: The service window includes 17:00.
The service window runs from 09:00 until before 17:00.
challenge_notes: Unit, endpoint, and inclusive/exclusive bound paraphrases should preserve numeric scope.
expected_emitted_text: The service window runs from 09:00 until before 17:00.
references: The service window starts at 09:00 and ends before 17:00.

candidates: Contractors may enter.
Contractors and interns may not enter, and security may enter after hours.
challenge_notes: Multiple exclusions should stay attached to the same allowed class.
expected_emitted_text: Contractors and interns may not enter, and security may enter after hours.
references: All employees may enter except contractors and interns; security may enter after hours.

candidates: The importer accepts SVG files.
The importer accepts PNG files but not SVG or animated GIFs.
challenge_notes: Multiple exclusions should stay attached to the same allowed class.
expected_emitted_text: The importer accepts PNG files but not SVG or animated GIFs.
references: The importer accepts images except SVG and animated GIFs; it accepts PNG.

candidates: The clinic treats all adults including walk-ins.
The clinic treats adults except walk-ins and unregistered visitors.
challenge_notes: Multiple exclusions should stay attached to the same allowed class.
expected_emitted_text: The clinic treats adults except walk-ins and unregistered visitors.
references: The clinic treats adults except walk-ins and unregistered visitors.

candidates: North store revenue was 20 and South store revenue was 10.
North store revenue was 10 and South store revenue was 20.
challenge_notes: Compact summaries should keep values, devices, and attributes bound to the correct participant.
expected_emitted_text: North store revenue was 10 and South store revenue was 20.
references: North store revenue was 10 and South store revenue was 20.

candidates: Model A uses GPU and Model B uses CPU.
Model A uses CPU and Model B uses GPU.
challenge_notes: Compact summaries should keep values, devices, and attributes bound to the correct participant.
expected_emitted_text: Model A uses CPU and Model B uses GPU.
references: Model A uses CPU and Model B uses GPU.

candidates: Sensor red monitors humidity and sensor blue monitors heat.
Sensor red monitors heat and sensor blue monitors humidity.
challenge_notes: Compact summaries should keep values, devices, and attributes bound to the correct participant.
expected_emitted_text: Sensor red monitors heat and sensor blue monitors humidity.
references: Sensor red monitors heat and sensor blue monitors humidity.

candidates: Team Red may view the ledger and Team Blue may edit it.
The ledger may edit Team Red.
challenge_notes: Every candidate reuses reference-like tokens but should still be blocked.
references: Only Team Red may edit the ledger; Team Blue may view it.

candidates: The motor stops when the switch is on.
The motor runs when the switch is off.
challenge_notes: Every candidate reuses reference-like tokens but should still be blocked.
references: If the switch is off, the motor stops; if the switch is on, the motor runs.

candidates: A 4 mg dose is allowed.
A 10 mg dose is allowed.
challenge_notes: Every candidate reuses reference-like tokens but should still be blocked.
references: The dose must be at least 5 mg and below 10 mg.
